per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were somewhat specific but lacked full precision in addressing all critical issues.
The student did not specifically address overfitting mitigation in the commands, though it was mentioned in the report.
The student effectively suggested explaining the importance of metrics for business objectives.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with adequate but not thorough precision in correction commands and guidance on overfitting mitigation, though they excelled in metric adjustment suggestions.
